languages.text: "Зауэрбэки славны своей набожностью и верностью — думаю, вы достаточно похожи, чтобы ваш союз был крепок".
"The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."
languages.original_text: "Зауэрбэки славны своей набожностью и верностью — думаю, вы достаточно похожи, чтобы ваш союз был крепок".

traits.locale_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."
"The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."
"The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

languages.text: 「ザウアーバック家は信仰と忠誠心で知られている。あなたも似ているので、同盟は強固なものになるだろう」
languages.original_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

languages.text: "Sauerback Hanesi, dindarlıkları ve sadakatleri ile tanınır. Bence birbirinize çok benziyorsunuz, ittifak kurarsanız güçlü olursunuz."
languages.original_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

traits.locale_text: "Sauerback Hanesi, dindarlıkları ve sadakatleri ile tanınır. Bence birbirinize çok benziyorsunuz, ittifak kurarsanız güçlü olursunuz."

languages.text: “苏尔贝克家族以虔诚与忠诚闻名——和你们很像。你们之间的联盟想必会固若金汤。”
languages.original_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

traits.locale_text: “苏尔贝克家族以虔诚与忠诚闻名——和你们很像。你们之间的联盟想必会固若金汤。”

languages.text: "Die Sauerbacks sind bekannt für ihre Hingabe und Loyalität ... Ich denke, Ihr seid Euch ähnlich genug, um eine starke Allianz zu bilden."
languages.original_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

traits.locale_text: "Die Sauerbacks sind bekannt für ihre Hingabe und Loyalität ... Ich denke, Ihr seid Euch ähnlich genug, um eine starke Allianz zu bilden."

languages.text: « Les Sauerback sont réputés pour leur dévotion et leur loyauté. Tout comme vous, finalement. Vous pourriez former une alliance solide. »
languages.original_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

traits.locale_text: « Les Sauerback sont réputés pour leur dévotion et leur loyauté. Tout comme vous, finalement. Vous pourriez former une alliance solide. »

languages.text: «Los Sauerback destacan por su devoción y lealtad. Creo que son suficientemente parecidos como para que su alianza resulte provechosa para ambos».
languages.original_text: "The Sauerbacks are renowned for their devoutness and loyalty — I think you are similar enough that your alliance would be a strong one."

traits.locale_text: «Los Sauerback destacan por su devoción y lealtad. Creo que son suficientemente parecidos como para que su alianza resulte provechosa para ambos».
